project_type: Python script that generates Excel calculator + new HTML generator
build_system: Python scripts run directly, no build system
test_framework: Manual verification - open output file, check calculations match
verification_instructions: 1. Run python3 generate_html.py to generate the HTML file. 2. Verify the file is created successfully. 3. Verify the HTML is well-formed. 4. Spot-check premium calculations match the formula: Premi Tahunan = RS Premium * 1.12 (rounded to nearest 100), Premi Bulanan = Tahunan * 1.14 / 12 (rounded to nearest 100).
snapshot_or_generated_files: Kalkulator_Premi_MiUHC.html is the generated output file
setup_instructions: Python 3.9+ is pre-installed. No additional packages needed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY - no external CDN, packages, or network. All CSS/JS must be inline in the HTML. No external fonts or icon libraries. Everything self-contained.
contribution_requirements: Output must be a single self-contained HTML file with embedded data, CSS, and JS
key_patterns: generate_excel.py uses extract_syariah_data() and extract_konvensional_data() to get raw premium data from PDFs. Data structure: {'PRIA': {age: [13 values]}, 'WANITA': {age: [13 values]}}. Column order: Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Topaz, Topaz ID, Jade, Jade ID, Sapphire, Diamond Smart, Ruby Smart, Emerald Smart, Topaz Smart, Jade Smart. Formula: Premi Tahunan = RS * 1.12 rounded to -2, Premi Bulanan = Tahunan * 1.14 / 12 rounded to -2.
relevant_files: /projects/sandbox/kirodev/B. Tabel Premi Syariah 2024 - Miuhc Versi Quick PDF (3).pdf
/projects/sandbox/kirodev/B. Tabel Premi Miuhc Versi Quick PDF Per Sep 2025 (3).pdf
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/kirodev/ - contains generate_excel.py (existing), PDFs (data source), and will contain the new generate_html.py and output HTML
